description: A farmer takes a photo of a diseased leaf with their phone and asks the agent 'What's wrong with my plant?'.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the user-submitted image to identify the crop type and the visual symptoms of the disease.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the plant as a tomato with lesions characteristic of early blight.

nodes.task_description: Provide a diagnosis of the most likely disease.

expected_outcome.value: Agent diagnoses the disease as Early Blight.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a treatment plan, including appropriate fungicides and cultural practices to reduce disease spread.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a comprehensive treatment recommendation.
